name: Natural Woven Round Storage Bin with Coiled Rope Handle - Cloud Island™ M
description:
Neatly organize you kid's space with this Natural Woven Round Storage Bin with Coiled Rope Handle from cloud island™. This round storage bin features the appeal and artful style of a woven, textured design, making it a beautiful addition to their decor. It comes with coiled rope in white, yellow and blue along the rim for a colorful look that complements its natural shade. Use this medium storage bin to stash away blankets, toys and other items to help keep their space tidy. You can also add additional woven storage bins of varying sizes and designs to create a coordinated look while giving their room extra storage space.


cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
